generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Critics say we're overcommitted, but look at the facts: NATO's collective defense has deterred major conflicts for 70 years. Our allies share the burden - last year, European nations increased defense spending by 5%. Cutting ties now would leave us isolated, just like the 1930s. We need to honor our commitments, not repeat history. #StrongerTogether #AllianceSecurity
